# Privacy Act

Jurisdiction: Canada
Region: CA
Citation: Privacy Act
Authority: Justice Laws Website / OPC Canada
Source URL: https://laws-lois.justice.gc.ca/eng/acts/P-21/
Topics: notice_transparency, data_subject_rights, retention_deletion, accountability
Keywords: Canada Privacy Act, federal public sector, personal information banks

## Summary
Canadian federal public-sector privacy law governing federal institutions' handling of personal information.

## Key compliance obligations
- Limit collection by federal institutions to operating programs or activities.
- Maintain personal information banks and access/correction rights.
- Use and disclose personal information under statutory conditions.
